creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Somehow audio/lua51-mpd is trying to bring in both lua51 and lua52.

The relevant error:

===>   lua51-mpd-0.1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/lua/5.1/socket/core.so - not found
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/lua52-luasocket-3.0.r1_3,1.txz
[110arm64-default-job-24] Installing lua52-luasocket-3.0.r1_3,1...

...

===>   lua51-mpd-0.1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/lua/5.1/socket/core.so - not found
*** Error code 1

I have no idea how the lua libraries work, so I cannot make a suggestion.
